steps.title: Use the omission clue
steps.content: The passage says Davis and Evans's adaptation omitted parts of Gershwin's opera, including the aria I Got Plenty o' Nuttin'. That means the aria belongs to the original opera but is absent from their version.

steps.title: Reject claims of inclusion
steps.content: Choice B says a brief quotation from the aria appears in the adaptation, contradicting the omission. Choice C invents listeners' opinions. Choice D incorrectly links the aria to Milestones. The answer is A.
